use std::borrow::Cow;

fn normalize_name(name: Cow<str>) -> String {
    let owned = name.to_owned();
    owned.trim().to_lowercase()
}

fn process_label(label: Cow<str>) -> String {
    let owned = label.to_owned();
    if owned.starts_with("temp_") {
        owned
    } else {
        format!("temp_{owned}")
    }
}

fn format_path(base: Cow<str>, file: &str) -> String {
    let base_owned = base.to_owned();
    format!("{base_owned}/{file}")
}
